Força Barça!

  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
  2. AgiTool

Uses of Annotation Interface
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.AgiTool

Packages that use AgiTool
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java
Provides the concrete domain model for tools implemented as Java methods via reflection.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.ide
Provides toolkits for interacting with the NetBeans IDE environment.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java
Provides Java-specific toolkits that leverage the NetBeans Java Source and Parsing APIs.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.maven
Contains the models and tools for interacting with the Apache Maven ecosystem within the NetBeans IDE.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.project
Provides a robust integration layer for NetBeans Project APIs, enabling programmatic management of the project lifecycle and environment within the ASI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.toolkit
Swing-specific toolkit implementations and context abstractions for Anahata ASI.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit
High-level tool implementations for autonomous agentic workflows.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java
Provides the core machinery for dynamic Java compilation and execution.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.resources
Provides the URI-centric engine for the management and surgical mutation of multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.shell
Host-level shell execution and stream management.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools
Provides experimental and multimodal toolkits that extend the core ASI capabilities into browser automation, advanced audio management, and speech synthesis.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.browser
Provides an abstract foundation and state management for browser automation toolkits.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.chrome
Provides a specialized toolkit for controlling Google Chrome and Chromium-based browsers.
uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.firefox
Provides the specialized toolkit for web automation using the Firefox browser.

    Constructor
    Description
     
    JavaMethodTool(JavaObjectToolkit toolkit, Method method, AgiTool toolAnnotation)
    The definitive, intelligent constructor for creating a JavaMethodTool from a reflection Method.

    Description

    Refactor.changeMethodSignature(String filePath, String memberFqn, String newName, String newReturnType, List<Refactor.ParameterChange> parameterChanges)
    Changes the signature of a method, including its name, return type, and parameters.

    Closes all files currently open in the IDE.
    String

    Copies a Java class to a new package or folder.
    String
    Refactor.copyFile(String sourcePath, String targetFolderPath)
    Copies a non-Java file to a different folder.
    String
    Refactor.encapsulateField(String filePath, String fieldFqn, String getterName, String setterName)
    Encapsulates a field by creating a getter and setter and updating all usages.
    String
    Refactor.extractInterface(String filePath, String interfaceName, List<String> memberFqns)
    Extracts an interface from a class.
    String
    Refactor.extractSuperclass(String filePath, String superclassName, List<String> memberFqns)
    Extracts a superclass from an existing class.
    String
    Editor.getOpenFiles()
    Gets a list of all files open in the editor, including their path and unsaved changes status.
    String
    IDE.getOutputTabsMarkdown()
    Gets a Markdown report of all open output tabs, including tails.
    String
    IDE.getTopComponentsMarkdown()
    Gets a Markdown table of all open IDE windows.
    String
    Refactor.inline(String filePath, String memberFqn, org.netbeans.modules.refactoring.java.api.InlineRefactoring.Type type)
    Inlines a method, constant, or variable.
    String
    Refactor.invertBoolean(String filePath, String memberFqn, String newName)
    Inverts a boolean method or variable.
    void
    IDE.monitorLogs(String grepPattern, Integer tailLines)
    Monitors the IDE log file (messages.log) by loading it into the context.
    String
    Refactor.moveClass(String sourcePath, String targetPath)
    Moves a Java class to a new package or integrates it into another class.
    String
    Refactor.moveFile(String sourcePath, String targetFolderPath)
    Moves a non-Java file to a different folder.
    String
    Refactor.moveInnerToTopLevel(String filePath, String memberFqn)
    Moves a nested/inner class to the top level.
    String
    Editor.openFile(String filePath, Integer scrollToLine)
    Opens a specified file in the NetBeans editor and optionally scrolls to a specific line.
    String
    Refactor.pullUp(String filePath, String targetClassFqn, List<String> memberFqns)
    Pulls up members to a superclass.
    String
    Refactor.pushDown(String filePath, List<String> memberFqns)
    Pushes down members to subclasses.
    String
    Refactor.rename(String filePath, String newName)
    Performs a programmatic rename refactoring of a file or class within the IDE.
    String
    Refactor.renameMember(String filePath, String memberFqn, String newName)
    Renames a class member (method or field) across all open projects.
    String
    Refactor.safeDelete(String filePath, boolean checkInComments)
    Performs a programmatic safe delete refactoring of a file or class.
    void
    IDE.selectIn(String path, IDE.SelectInTarget target)
    Selects and highlights a file or folder in a specific IDE view.
    String
    Refactor.useSupertype(String filePath, String supertypeFqn)
    Replaces usages of a class with a supertype where possible.
    String
    Refactor.whereUsed(String filePath, boolean searchInComments)
    Finds all usages of a file or class within all open projects.
    String
    Refactor.whereUsedMember(String filePath, String memberFqn, boolean searchInComments)
    Finds all usages of a specific member (field or method) within a Java file.

    Compiles and executes Java source code within the context of a specific NetBeans project.

    CodeModel.findTypes(String query, boolean caseSensitive, boolean preferOpenProjects, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize)
    Finds multiple Java types matching a query and returns a paginated result of minimalist, machine-readable keys.

    CodeModel.findTypesInPackage(String packageName, ElementKind kindFilter, boolean recursive, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize)
    Finds all types within a given package, with an option for recursive search.
    Page<Hints.HintInfo>
    Hints.getAllHints(String projectPath, List<String> hintIds, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize)
    Gets all Java hints (warnings, suggestions) for a specific project, with pagination and optional type filtering.
    List<Hints.HintInfo>
    Hints.getFileHints(String filePath)
    Gets all Java hints for a specific file.
    List<Hints.HintInfo>
    Hints.getMemberHints(String filePath, String memberFqn)
    Gets all Java hints for a specific class member.
    String
    CodeModel.getMemberJavadocs(JavaMember member)
    Gets the Javadoc for a specific JavaMember.
    String
    CodeModel.getMemberJavadocsByFqn(String memberFqn)
    Gets the Javadoc for a member specified by its fully qualified name.

    CodeModel.getMembers(JavaType javaType, String nameQuery, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize, List<ElementKind> kindFilters)
    Gets a paginated list of all members (fields, constructors, methods) for a given type.
    JavaMemberPage
    CodeModel.getMembersByFqn(String fqn, String nameQuery, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize, List<ElementKind> kindFilters)
    Gets a paginated list of all members for a type specified by its fully qualified name.
    String
    CodeModel.getMemberSources(JavaMember member)
    Gets the source code for a specific JavaMember.
    String
    CodeModel.getMemberSourcesByFqn(String memberFqn)
    Gets the source code for a member specified by its fully qualified name.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSubtypes(JavaType javaType, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all subtypes (implementations and subclasses) of a given JavaType.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSubtypesByFqn(String fqn, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all subtypes of a type specified by its fully qualified name.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSupertypes(JavaType javaType, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all supertypes (base classes and interfaces) of a given JavaType.
    JavaHierarchyNode
    CodeModel.getSupertypesByFqn(String fqn, Integer maxDepth)
    Recursively searches for all supertypes of a type specified by its fully qualified name.
    String
    CodeModel.getTypeJavadocs(JavaType javaType)
    Gets the Javadoc for a given JavaType.
    String
    CodeModel.getTypeJavadocsByFqn(String fqn)
    Gets the Javadoc for a type specified by its fully qualified name.

    Returns a list of all unique Hint IDs registered in the NetBeans IDE.
    String

    Gets the source file for a given JavaType and automatically registers it as a resource.
    String
    CodeModel.loadTypeSourcesByFqn(String fqn)
    Gets the source file for a type specified by its fully qualified name and registers it as a resource.
    String

    Optimizes imports (converts FQNs to simple names, removes unused).
    String

    Applies a batch of member-level modifications to ONE Java file synchronously, saving and rebuilding the AST.
    String
    CodeRefiner.reformat(String filePath, boolean save)
    Reformats a file using IDE rules.
    String
    Hints.removeUnusedImports(String filePath)
    Surgically removes all unused imports from a Java source file.

    Method
    Description

    Maven.addDependency(String projectPath, String groupId, String artifactId, String version, String scope, String classifier, String type)

    Downloads all missing dependencies artifacts for a given Maven project.

    Gets the list of dependencies directly declared in the pom.xml.

    Gets the final, fully resolved list of transitive dependencies for the project.

    MavenSearchResultPage
    Maven.searchMavenIndex(String query, Integer startIndex, Integer pageSize)
    Searches the Maven index for artifacts matching a given query.

    void

    Adds a specific rectangular region to the live share.

    Stops sharing a specific region by its ID.
    String

    Captures a screenshot of a specific physical display device identified by its index.
    String
    Screens.toggleDeviceSharing(int deviceIdx)
    Toggles sharing for a specific screen device.

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.toolkit with annotations of type AgiTool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    History.clearGarbageCollectorLogs()
    Clears all Context Window Garbage Collector (CwGC) log records from memory.
    String
    AsiContainer.createNewAgi(boolean open, String agiProviderUUID, String modelID, List<String> toolkitFqns, List<String> resourceURIs, String initialMessage)
    Creates a new AGI session with optional model and tool configuration.
    String
    AsiContainer.dumpHistory(String sessionId)
    Returns a plain text dump of the entire conversation history for a session.
    String
    Session.enableHostedTools()
    Switches the session to server-side tool mode.
    String
    AsiContainer.getAgiDetails(String sessionId)
    Returns detailed metadata for a specific AGI session, including its enabled toolkits, context providers, and managed resources.
    String
    Host.killProcess(long pid, boolean force)
    Terminates a specific process by its PID.
    String
    Session.killRunningTools(List<Long> toolCallIds)
    Signals one or more currently executing background tools to stop.
    String
    AsiContainer.listActiveAgis()
    Returns a Markdown table of all active AGI sessions in the container.
    String
    AsiContainer.listAiModels(String providerUuid)
    Returns a Markdown table of all available models for a specific AI provider.
    String
    AsiContainer.listAiProviders()
    Returns a Markdown table of all configured AI providers, their UUIDs, endpoints, and API key statuses.
    List<String>
    Host.listProcesses()
    Lists all active processes on the host system.
    String
    Audio.play(String uri, String deviceId)
    Plays an audio file from a URI on the selected output device.
    String
    Audio.record(int durationSeconds, String deviceId)
    Records audio from the selected input device for a specified duration.
    String
    Audio.selectOutputDevice(String deviceId)
    Selects a specific device for playback for the current session.
    String
    Audio.selectRecordingDevice(String deviceId)
    Selects a specific device for recording for the current session.
    void
    Session.setContextProviderProviding(boolean providing, List<String> providerIds)
    Enables or disables specific context providers within the session hierarchy.
    String
    History.setInjectInbandMetadata(boolean enabled)
    Toggles the injection of in-band metadata headers.
    String
    History.setMessagePruningState(List<Long> messageIds, PruningState newState)
    Updates the pruning policy for all parts of one or more messages.
    String
    History.setPartPruningState(List<Long> partIds, PruningState newState)
    Updates the pruning policy for specific message parts.
    void
    Session.setToolkitEnabled(boolean enabled, List<String> toolkitNames)
    Enables or disables multiple toolkits by their names.
    String
    Session.updateSessionNickname(String nickName)
    Updates the AGIs nickname.
    String
    Session.updateSessionSummary(String summary)
    Updates the human-readable summary of the current session.

    Method
    Description

    Sets the 'providing' flag of various resources by their UUID.
    void
    Resources.unloadResources(List<String> resourceIds)

    void

    String

    Updates an existing text file using full content replacement.
    void
    Resources.updateViewport(String resourceId, TextViewportSettings settings)
    Updates the viewport configuration for an existing text resource.

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.yam.tools.browser with annotations of type AgiTool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    AbstractBrowser.clickElement(String droneId, String identifier)
    Performs a stateful click by first attempting to locate the element using a multi-strategy search (ID, Name, Link Text, XPath text content).
    String
    AbstractBrowser.close(String droneId)
    Closes the browser session and removes it from the registry.
    Object
    AbstractBrowser.executeScript(String droneId, String script)
    Executes arbitrary JavaScript in the current browser session.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.fillForm(String droneId, Map<String,String> data)
    Fills a web form with the provided data.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.getPageSource(String droneId)
    Gets the full HTML source of the current page.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.getPageText(String droneId)
    Gets the visible text content of the current page.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.getScreenshot(String droneId, String name)
    Takes a screenshot of the current page and attaches it to the session.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.getStatus(String droneId)
    Gets the current status of the browser driver for a specific drone.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.goBack(String droneId)
    Navigates back in the browser history.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.goForward(String droneId)
    Navigates forward in the browser history.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.inspectForm(String droneId)
    Inspects the current page for input fields and buttons.
    abstract String
    AbstractBrowser.killAll()
    Closes all active browser processes.
    abstract List<String>
    AbstractBrowser.listTabs(String droneId)
    Lists all open tabs/windows in the specified drone.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.navigate(String droneId, String url)
    Navigates the specified drone to a new URL.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.openNewTab(String droneId, String url)
     
    String
    AbstractBrowser.refresh(String droneId)
    Refreshes the current page.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.scrollToElement(String droneId, String identifier)
    Scrolls the specified element into view.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.switchToTab(String droneId, int index)
    Switches the active tab/window by its index.
    String
    AbstractBrowser.waitForElement(String droneId, String cssSelector, int timeoutSeconds)
    Safely executes a CSS-based visibility check using WebDriverWait.
